title: Maroon 5 Rocks Out During Clarins’ “A Night of Extra” at Academy Museum in Los Angeles
summary: To pump the launch of its new Extra-Firming Energy, Clarins hosted stars and influencers on the Academy Museum’s scenic terrace to close out a heat wave in the city.

title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
summary: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.
